untranslatable_reason: Pattern identification (broadening formation detection) requires visual/structural pattern recognition that cannot be expressed with simple price/indicator thresholds. The signal requires identifying a specific chart pattern (tall broadening formation with right-angled and ascending characteristics) which is not available in the allowed indicators list. A breakout from this pattern is measurable (using Donchian channels as proxy), but the pattern detection itself is untranslatable.
translation_notes: Approximated breakout detection using Donchian channels (20-period) as a proxy for broadening formation extremes. Entry triggers on breakout above upper or below lower band. Stop loss set to median height range (13.24%). Hold period set to average formation length (79 days). Direction is bidirectional per signal parameters. Success rates vary significantly by market regime (bull up: 36%, bear up: 16%, bull down: -16%, bear down: -23%) but cannot be encoded in rules. Manual pattern identification is required before this rule fires.
